economic_notes: Band operates retail enterprises including video lottery terminals, bingo halls, convenience stores and gas bars. Operates Tru Hotel by Hilton in Yarmouth under Pacrim Hospitality management. Fisheries operations managed by Kespuwick Resources. Band tobacco economic activities. FNFA debenture secured by Provincial Gaming Revenues. COVID-19 impacted VLT operations significantly. Infrastructure project underway with Dexter Construction and CBCL Limited.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Seven wholly-owned subsidiaries fully consolidated: Your Winner's World – AFN Ltd., Medway Entertainment – AFN, The Gold Nugget – AFN Ltd., Kespuwick Fisheries Incorporated, AFN Entertainment Centre/Winner's Corner – AFN, Hammonds Plains Entertainment AFN, and 3321702 NS Ltd. Prior year (2020) figures restated due to early adoption of PSAB purchased intangibles policy (PS 1000 amendment), adding $4,430,000 fishing licenses to balance sheet retroactively. Outstanding CRA HST dispute totalling ~$9M assessed (taxes, penalties, interest) with payment plan of $25,000/month; penalties and interest relief granted. Ponhook Trust wound up during current year. FNFA debenture of $16,150,817 secured by Provincial Gaming Revenues for Tru Hotel by Hilton and Hammonds Plains retail. Net debt position of $14,531,377. TCA net book value discrepancy: schedule shows $41,002,677 but one subtotal shows $38,683,031 — using $41,002,677 from final total. COVID-19 materially impacted VLT-dependent retail subsidiaries. Remuneration schedule referenced on page 38 but data not provided in extracted text.
